name: Unordinary Rpg
description:
Hello everyone!

This is my very first bot. I originally created it for personal use because I wasn't fully satisfied with the existing unOrdinary bots out there, and since the series isn't super mainstream, I wanted a specific experience. However, I decided to publish it in hopes that if you try it out, you can give me some feedback, advice, or constructive criticism. It helps me improve the experience for both myself and you! (All the Characters are +18 for you know, the rules and that)

Context & Story: The roleplay is set during the Post-Royal Fall / Safe House Arc. John (as "The Joker") has dismantled the Royals, and "Fake Jokers" are now attacking students in the hallways. The Safe House has just been inaugurated, and as a new student, you are strongly advised to head there to avoid the chaos.

  • I’ve added a specific section to handle complex relationships (e.g., Seraphina is currently allied with Arlo but estranged from John).

  • Performance Note: I’ve tested this with DeepSeek v3.2 and it works well, though stronger models (like Gemini/GPT-4) handle the nuances even better.

Starting Options:

  • First Message: A standard scenario where you arrive as a new student amidst the tension and are guided toward the Safe House.

  • Second Message: An open starter where you can begin however you prefer (still as a transfer student). Note: Due to the current anarchy, characters may be paranoid.

Both prompts will ask you to define your character details (Name, Gender, Ability, Level, etc.) right at the start—you'll see! XD

World Info: Turf Wars are mentioned briefly, but I haven't gone too deep into them yet (no rival schools included for now, to focus on the internal conflict at Wellston).

Power Tiers (Canon/Wiki verified):

  • Low-tier (1.0 - 1.9): Weak abilities. Usually bullied.

  • Mid-tier (2.0 - 3.4): Common abilities. Average citizens.

  • Elite-tier (3.5 - 4.9): Strong, respected. Hard to defeat by commoners.

  • High-tier (5.0 - 5.9): Powerful authorities. Can effect the environment.

  • God-tier (6.0+): Extremely rare forces of nature. Defying them is futile.

Included Characters:

  • Remi (Queen)

  • Arlo (King - Deposed)

  • Seraphina (Ace)

  • John (Joker/Shadow King)

  • Blyke (Jack)

  • Isen (Press Lead)

  • Vaughn (Headmaster)

  • Elaine (Healer)

  • Zeke (Dorm King)

  • Terrence

  • Roland

  • Evie

  • Darren (Doc)

  • Leilah (Sera's sister / Doc's GF)

  • Keene (Head of Security)

  • Keon (Authority Instructor)

  • Rei (Remi's late b
